title: Sunny berry oatmeal
description: Creamy rolled oats topped with mixed berries, almonds, and a drizzle of honey.
steps: Bring milk to a gentle simmer in a small pot.
Stir in oats and a pinch of salt. Cook 5-7 minutes until creamy, stirring often.
Spoon into a bowl, top with berries and almonds.
Drizzle with honey and serve warm.

title: Smashed avocado toast with chili crunch
description: Sourdough loaded with smashed avocado, lemon, and crispy chili flakes.
steps: Toast the sourdough until golden.
Halve the avocado, scoop into a bowl, mash with lemon juice and salt.
Spread the avocado generously on toast.
Top with chili crunch oil and serve immediately.

title: Greek yogurt & honey parfait
description: Layered yogurt, granola, and seasonal fruit — 5 minutes flat.
steps: Spoon half the yogurt into a glass.
Add half the fruit, then half the granola.
Repeat with remaining yogurt, fruit, and granola.
Drizzle with honey and serve.

title: Mediterranean chickpea bowl with herb yogurt
description: Warm chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, and herby yogurt over fluffy couscous.
steps: Pour couscous into a bowl, cover with boiling water, and rest 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork.
Heat olive oil in a pan, add chickpeas and cumin. Sauté 5 minutes until warmed and slightly crisp.
Stir herbs and a squeeze of lemon into the yogurt; season.
Plate couscous, top with chickpeas, cucumber, and tomatoes.
Spoon over the herb yogurt and serve.

title: Honey-mustard chicken salad
description: Pan-seared chicken over crisp greens with a tangy honey-mustard vinaigrette.
steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan. Sear chicken 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through. Rest 5 minutes, then slice.
Whisk remaining oil, mustard, honey, and vinegar in a small bowl.
Toss greens, tomatoes, and onion with half the dressing.
Top with sliced chicken, drizzle with remaining dressing, and serve.

title: Spicy peanut tofu stir-fry
description: Crisp tofu, snap peas, and bell peppers in a creamy peanut-chili sauce.
steps: Press tofu between paper towels for 10 minutes, then cube.
Cook rice or noodles per package directions; set aside.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, chili paste, and 3 tbsp warm water until smooth.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Sear tofu until golden on all sides, about 6 minutes. Remove.
Add garlic, peppers, and snap peas. Stir-fry 3 minutes.
Return tofu, pour over sauce, toss to coat. Serve over rice or noodles.

title: Sheet-pan salmon & lemon vegetables
description: One-tray dinner — salmon fillets, broccoli, and potatoes with lemon and herbs.
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C / 425°F.
Toss potatoes with 1 tbsp oil, salt, and pepper. Roast on a sheet pan 15 minutes.
Add broccoli and garlic to the pan, drizzle with remaining oil and oregano.
Make space for the salmon, season fillets and lay over lemon slices.
Roast 12-14 minutes until salmon flakes easily.
Squeeze any remaining lemon over and serve.

title: Black bean & corn tacos
description: Smoky black beans and charred corn in soft tortillas with avocado and lime.
steps: Heat oil in a pan, add corn and char 3-4 minutes without stirring.
Add beans, cumin, and paprika. Cook 5 minutes, mashing some beans for texture.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave.
Fill tortillas with the bean mixture, top with avocado and cilantro.
Serve with lime wedges to squeeze over.

title: Pesto pasta with cherry tomatoes
description: Quick weeknight pasta tossed with basil pesto, blistered tomatoes, and parmesan.
steps: Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve 100 ml pasta water before draining.
Heat olive oil in a pan, add tomatoes whole. Cook 5 minutes until they blister and burst.
Off the heat, add cooked pasta, pesto, and a splash of pasta water. Toss to coat.
Plate and finish with parmesan and torn basil.

title: Roasted vegetable & quinoa traybake
description: Sweet roasted vegetables over fluffy quinoa with tahini-lemon dressing.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F. Toss vegetables with oil, paprika, salt, and pepper on a sheet pan.
Roast 25-30 minutes, tossing once, until edges are caramelized.
Meanwhile, rinse quinoa and simmer in 400 ml water for 15 minutes. Rest covered 5 minutes.
Whisk tahini, lemon juice, and 3 tbsp warm water until creamy.
Plate quinoa, top with roasted vegetables, drizzle with tahini sauce.

title: Caprese with crusty bread
description: Tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and basil — the simplest summer plate.
steps: Arrange tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate, alternating.
Tuck basil leaves between the layers.
Drizzle with olive oil, balsamic, salt, and a generous grind of pepper.
Serve with bread on the side.

title: Lemon-garlic shrimp linguine
description: Buttery shrimp with garlic, white wine, and parsley over silky linguine.
steps: Cook linguine in salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve 100 ml pasta water.
Heat olive oil and 1 tbsp butter in a pan. Add garlic and cook 30 seconds.
Add shrimp and cook 2-3 minutes per side until pink. Remove.
Pour in white wine and lemon juice; reduce 1 minute.
Add remaining butter, a splash of pasta water, and the linguine. Toss.
Return shrimp, add lemon zest and parsley. Serve immediately.
